description: CompositionWhite round neck full sleeves t-shirt made of 100% cotton, softly ribbed neckline, graphic print on the front with bold lettering in metallic accents and brand tab appliqued on the right hemFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Look cool and confident in this white t-shirt from puma. Relax in the cottony softness of this smart tee, as people check out the amazing design on it. Pair this tee with jeans and casual shoes for an awesome look.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
